steps.title: Apply the study finding
steps.content: Sethi et al. found that democratic strength associated with low inequality restrains inflationary pressures. Canada has those traits, yet its 2018 inflation rate was higher than Oman's.

steps.title: Resolve the Canada puzzle
steps.content: Choice A questions the indices without support. Choice B revives the critique that the study undercuts. Choice D overattributes the difference to inequality. The best completion says something besides Canada's political structure contributed to its higher inflation. The answer is C.
